reviews.review1: Excellent service! The car was spotless and the pickup at Tirana Airport was smooth. Will use DriveNow again.
reviews.review2: Great value for money. The Duster was perfect for exploring the Albanian Riviera. Highly recommend!
reviews.review3: Very transparent pricing with no hidden fees. Cash payment made everything simple. Good experience overall.

documents.title: Documents required
documents.body: Bring your original passport (not just a photo) and a driving license held for at least 2 years. EU, UK, US, CA, AU, NZ, JP, CH licenses are accepted directly. Other licenses need an International Driving Permit. We photograph documents at pickup; copies are stored for 12 months and then deleted.

demo_notice.privacy_body: this website is currently for demonstration and testing only. Booking requests submitted through this website are not real reservations and do not create a rental contract.
demo_notice.terms_body: this website is currently for demonstration and testing only. Booking requests are not real reservations, do not guarantee vehicle availability, and do not create a rental contract.

who_we_are.title: Who We Are
who_we_are.body: Dua Makina is an Albania-based car rental website concept. You can contact us at

website_status.title: Current Website Status
website_status.body: The website is not currently operating as a live booking platform. Any forms, prices, vehicle availability, booking confirmations, or inquiry emails are for testing and demonstration purposes unless Dua Makina separately confirms otherwise in writing.

data_collect.title: Personal Data We May Collect
data_collect.item1: Contact details such as your name, email address, and phone number.
data_collect.item2: Driver details such as driver name, age, and licence expiry date.
data_collect.item3: Rental inquiry details such as pickup and drop-off locations, dates, vehicle, extras, selected countries, and special requests.
data_collect.item4: Technical and anti-spam data such as hCaptcha verification tokens, browser information, analytics events, and local storage preferences.

data_use.title: How We Use Data
data_use.body: We use submitted data to test the inquiry flow, respond to messages, prevent spam or abuse, improve the website, and understand basic website usage. We do not sell personal data.

third_party.title: Third-Party Services
third_party.body: The site may use Supabase for database and storage, EmailJS for inquiry email delivery, hCaptcha for spam protection, Vercel Analytics for basic website analytics, and jsDelivr for content delivery. These services may process data according to their own privacy terms.

cookies.title: Cookies And Local Storage
cookies.body: The website may use local storage or similar browser storage for selected language, currency, booking search details, cached vehicle data, and inquiry cooldown checks. Third-party services may use cookies or equivalent technologies for security, analytics, or delivery.

retention.title: Data Retention
retention.body: Because the site is in testing mode, inquiry data should only be kept as long as needed for testing, support, abuse prevention, or legal requirements. Before the site goes live, retention periods should be reviewed and documented.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.body: Depending on applicable law, you may have rights to request access, correction, deletion, restriction, objection, or withdrawal of consent for your personal data. To make a request, contact

website_status.title: Website Status
website_status.body: Dua Makina is currently presented as an Albania-based car rental website in demo/testing mode. The website is not currently a live rental booking service.

no_bookings.title: No Real Bookings
no_bookings.body: Submitting a search, inquiry, form, or booking request does not reserve a vehicle, does not create a rental agreement, and does not require payment. Any automated confirmation or message should be treated as test communication unless Dua Makina separately confirms a real arrangement in writing.

no_guarantee.title: No Price Or Availability Guarantee
no_guarantee.body: Vehicle listings, prices, deposits, insurance descriptions, locations, extras, and availability shown on the site may be placeholder or test information. They should not be relied on as a final commercial offer.

future_terms.title: Future Rental Terms Placeholder
future_terms.body: When the website becomes operational, real rental terms should clearly define payment, deposits, cancellation rules, pickup requirements, insurance coverage, mileage, cross-border permissions, ferry travel, driver eligibility, document checks, and vehicle return responsibilities.

user_responsibilities.title: User Responsibilities
user_responsibilities.body: You agree not to misuse the website, submit false or harmful information, attempt to interfere with the service, or use the site for unlawful purposes.

liability.title: Limitation Of Liability
liability.body: Because the website is in testing mode, Dua Makina is not liable for losses arising from reliance on test prices, test availability, demo booking flows, or temporary website errors, to the maximum extent permitted by applicable law.

contact.body_prefix: Questions about these terms can be sent to

third_party.body: The website may rely on third-party services including Supabase, EmailJS, hCaptcha, Vercel, jsDelivr, and external map or communication links. Dua Makina is not responsible for third-party service availability, terms, or policies.

documents.title: Documents Required
documents.q1: What documents do I need to rent a car?
documents.a1: You will need a valid passport or national ID card, and a valid driving license. If your license is not from an EU country, you may also need an International Driving Permit (IDP).
documents.q2: Is an International Driving Permit (IDP) required?
documents.a2: An IDP is required for drivers with licenses issued outside the European Union. EU driving licenses are accepted without an IDP.
documents.q3: How long must I have held my driving license?
documents.a3: You must have held your driving license for at least 2 years. Some premium vehicles may require 3 or more years of driving experience.

age.title: Age Requirements
age.q1: What is the minimum age to rent a vehicle?
age.a1: The minimum age to rent a car is 18 years. Some premium and SUV categories may require a different minimum age based on the vehicle.
age.q2: Is there a maximum age to rent a car?
age.a2: Yes, the maximum age for renting a car is 75 years. Drivers over 70 may be asked to provide additional documentation.
age.q3: Is there a young driver surcharge?
age.a3: Drivers aged 18-24 may be subject to a young driver surcharge depending on the vehicle.

payment.title: Payment & Pricing
payment.q1: Do I need a credit card to rent a car?
payment.a1: No, we do not require a credit card. All payments are made in CASH at the time of vehicle collection. This is our unique model that makes renting easier for everyone.
payment.a2: We accept payments in Albanian Lek (ALL), Euro (EUR), US Dollar (USD), and British Pound (GBP). We recommend paying in EUR or ALL for the best rates.
payment.a3: A security deposit may be required depending on the vehicle.
payment.a4: No hidden fees! Our prices include basic insurance, taxes, and 24/7 roadside assistance. Optional extras like GPS and child seats are clearly priced.

vehicle.title: Vehicle Selection
vehicle.q1: What types of vehicles do you offer?
vehicle.a1: We offer a wide range of vehicles including Economy cars, Compact sedans, SUVs, Premium vehicles, and Minivans. All vehicles are regularly maintained and serviced.
vehicle.q2: Which car should I choose for Albanian roads?
vehicle.a2: For mountain areas and countryside exploration, we recommend SUVs or vehicles with higher ground clearance. For city driving and coastal roads, any vehicle category works well.
vehicle.q3: Can I request a specific car model?
vehicle.a3: You can request a specific model, but we guarantee the car category, not the exact model. We display "or similar" for each listing as availability varies.

cross_border.title: Cross-Border & Travel
cross_border.q1: Can I take the car outside Albania?
cross_border.a1_prefix: Yes! Our vehicles are authorized for travel throughout Europe. However, you must inform us in advance and may need to purchase Green Card insurance (
cross_border.a2: Yes, ferry travel to Greece (Saranda-Corfu) and Italy (Durres-Bari) is permitted with prior notification. Please let us know when booking.
cross_border.a3: Most of our vehicles come with unlimited mileage. For vehicles with limits, the daily allowance is typically 300km with additional kilometers charged at €0.15/km.

pickup.title: Pickup & Return
pickup.q1: What are your pickup and return locations?
pickup.a1: We offer pickup at various locations throughout Albania. Airport pickups are available 24/7.
pickup.q2: Can I return the car to a different location?
pickup.a2: Yes, one-way rentals are available. There may be an additional fee depending on the pickup and return locations.
pickup.q3: What happens if my flight is delayed?
pickup.a3: If your flight is delayed, please contact us immediately so we can adjust your pickup time accordingly.

booking.title: Booking & Modifications
booking.q1: How do I book a car?
booking.a1: Browse our fleet, select your dates and vehicle, and submit a booking inquiry. Our team will confirm availability within 12 hours and provide payment instructions.
booking.a2: Yes, you can modify your booking via email or WhatsApp up to 1 week before pickup. Changes are subject to availability.
booking.a3: Free cancellation is available up to 48 hours before your scheduled pickup time. Cancellations within 48 hours may be subject to a fee.

contact_cta.title: Still have questions?
contact_cta.body: Our team is ready to help you with any questions about your car rental.
